data_access_policy: Agents must not access databases directly; all factual inputs are provided through ContextBundle and upstream step outputs.
global_constraints: 不得编造数据；缺事实、数值、年份、来源或假设时必须标记为信息缺口/需人工复核。
所有事实、数据、政策、市场判断和资源建议必须附 citations。
每一步输出都必须可保存和审计。

company_diagnosis.goal: 诊断企业、产品、团队、产能、认证和出海准备度

market_research.goal: 研究目标市场与国家机会、壁垒和证据边界

channel_strategy.goal: 设计渠道进入策略和营销动作
channel_strategy.input: ContextBundle plus company_diagnosis and market_research outputs

resource_matching.goal: 匹配展会、服务商、认证、物流、平台招商、园区和金融资源
resource_matching.input: ContextBundle resource templates plus upstream outputs

financial_planning.goal: 分析投融资、预算、现金流、扩产和投入产出假设
financial_planning.input: ContextBundle finance/capacity data plus channel/resource outputs

risk_compliance.goal: 检查合规、认证、贸易、税务、数据、合同和运营风险
risk_compliance.input: ContextBundle evidence plus all analytical outputs

report_writer.goal: 整合完整企业出海报告 JSON
report_writer.input: Original prompt, ContextBundle, JSON schema example and all upstream outputs

quality_review.goal: 复核来源、具体性和预算假设，决定 approved 或 revision_required
quality_review.input: ContextBundle, all upstream outputs and final report JSON
quality_review.output: Quality review JSON with status, issues and required_revisions
